name: Regex Word Boundary for English Prepositions
description: When matching English prepositions (in, from, to, at, by) in regex patterns that parse natural language, use \b word boundaries to prevent matching within longer words (e.g., 'Sprint' contains 'in')

trigger.errorMessage: Regex pattern for preposition (in/from/to) matches within longer words like 'Sprint', 'Information', 'Platform'

steps.description: Replace bare preposition matches like (?:from|in) with word-boundary versions \b(?:from|in)\b
Add test case with words containing the preposition as a substring (e.g., 'Sprint' for 'in', 'Platform' for 'at')
